label: Menologion for the month of Ab

work_wit.alt_title: Menologion for the month of Ab
note: Menologion for the month of Ab (August), beginning on the 7th with the martyrdom of St. Dometius and ending on the 31st with a Mimar by St. Germanus Archbishop of Constantinople on the restoration of Our Lady's Sanctuary
